description: Realistic blade template queries based on actual banking application templates

account_opening_forms.query: What are all the fields in the account opening form?
How is CSRF protection implemented in the account opening form?
What scheme codes are available for account opening and how are they displayed?
Show me the special declaration section for account opening including lead generation and customer meeting location

authentication_security.query: How does the login page handle authentication with CSRF tokens?
What validation errors are displayed on the login form?
How is the user authentication modal implemented in the submission view?
What happens when unauthorized tampering is detected?

kyc_documents.query: What OVD document types can be uploaded for KYC verification?
How are Aadhaar, Passport, Voter ID and Driving Licence details captured in the OVD form?
Show me the address proof section in OVD submission for HUF accounts

risk_classification.query: What fields are required for risk classification of a customer?
How is PEP status and US person flag captured in risk classification?
Show me the annual turnover and source of funds fields in risk assessment

nomination_funding.query: What nominee details can be added for account opening?
How many nominees can be added for different account types?
What initial funding options are available - Cheque, NEFT/RTGS or DCB Account?
Show me the financial information form including tenure and auto-renewal settings

declarations_compliance.query: What declarations are required before account submission?
How are third-party declarations and PEP declarations captured with file uploads?
Show me the vernacular language and name mismatch declaration checkboxes

delight_kit_management.query: How can users search and filter delight kits by scheme code and branch ID?
What is the kit dispatch workflow with customer ID and account number filters?
Show me the kit count approval table with DR status filters
How is the delight kit sequence number selected and saved?
What columns are displayed in the inventory table for scheme stock tracking?

breadcrumb_navigation.query: What are the steps in the multi-step account opening breadcrumb navigation?
How does the breadcrumb handle navigation between Basic Details, OVD Documents, CIDD, Nomination and Review steps?

chat_communication.query: How does the user chat interface display messages between sender and recipient?
Show me the searchable users list sidebar for chat
How are user initials displayed as avatars in the chat interface?

review_submission.query: What information is shown in the review page before final submission?
How is the submission form rendered with CIF declaration and account details?
Show me the mask/unmask functionality for sensitive fields in review mode

tracking_monitoring.query: How can users track AOF numbers and view application status?
Show me the timeline view with activity tracking and TAT warnings
What filters are available for dispatch applications tracking?

admin_management.query: How does the master table management interface allow adding columns and exporting data?
Show me the branch table data form with cluster, zone and region fields
How are email and SMS templates created with message type and role selection?
What fields are captured when adding a new user with employee ID?

logging_monitoring.query: How can admins view user activity logs filtered by user name, date and module?
Show me the exception log viewer with user name and timer filters
What information is displayed in the API queue log table?
How are pending email/SMS notifications tracked by date?
Show me the DSA API log viewer with table selection dropdown

dashboard_reports.query: What statistics are shown on the user dashboard for savings accounts?
How does the branch inventory view display stock details by branch?
Show me the customer enquiry modal with account details grid

entity_corporate.query: What entity office address fields are required for corporate KYC?
How is the entity name displayed in the entity details view?

utilities.query: How does the airway bill batch management page handle printing and actions?
Show me the debug info upload interface with text file import
What is shown in the application version table?
How does the one-time task panel for resetting AOF counter work?

help_documentation.query: How are help videos and images displayed in the user help page?
Show me the modal implementation for displaying workflow diagrams

complex_multi_template_queries.query: Walk me through the complete account opening workflow from basic details to final submission
How do different blade templates handle the review mode with disabled inputs and masked fields?
What blade directives are used across templates for authentication checks - @auth, @if, @csrf?
Compare how forms handle file uploads for KYC documents, declarations and debug files
How are DataTables initialized across different views for kits, logs and tracking?

edge_cases.query: How are HUF accounts handled differently in OVD submission and nominee sections?
What conditional logic determines ETB vs NTB customer field visibility?
How does the system handle minor accounts differently in funding and account setup?

performance_test_batch: Show all fields in account opening form with scheme code dropdown
How to add OVD documents with Aadhaar and Passport details?
What initial funding methods are supported for new accounts?
How to search delight kits by customer ID and kit number?
Show the breadcrumb steps for account onboarding flow
How is CSRF token used in login and form submissions?
What nominee information is captured including guardian details?
How to track AOF status and view timeline activities?
Show risk classification fields for annual turnover and PEP status
How are declarations handled with file upload proof?
